meta.description: ASTRA trickle seed dataset — 55 residential electrical jobs across Houston metro

jobs.notes: Permit pulled. Inspector flagged missing bonding screw — fixed on site. FPE panel had melted bus bar on 3 circuits.
Zinsco panel — breakers fused to bus. Had to cut them out. Homeowner present entire job. Added 2 extra circuits for kitchen.
Replaced all ungrounded 2-prong outlets in living and dining rooms. Old K&T in walls — did not disturb, ran new home runs where needed.
Full 100A to 200A service upgrade. CenterPoint disconnect required — 2 day job. Old FPE riser was corroded at weatherhead.
Kitchen remodel — 8 recessed lights replacing single center fixture. 2 zones on separate dimmers. Attic access good, blown-in insulation cleared around cans.
3 fans — master, guest, living room. All had old boxes not fan-rated. Replaced boxes and ran 14/3 for independent fan/light control.
EV charger circuit — 50A 240V to garage. 45ft run through attic. Homeowner installing Tesla Wall Connector themselves.
Dead outlets in guest bedroom. Found backstabbed receptacle with burnt connection. Replaced 2 devices, pigtailed all connections on circuit. Tested all outlets.
Straightforward FPE swap. Panel in garage, good access. All existing circuits labeled correctly for once.

materials.name: SQD QO 60A DP Breaker (main panel feed)

jobs.notes: Subpanel in detached garage for workshop. 60A feed, 65ft run. Trenched conduit from house to garage. Customer adding woodworking equipment.
Outdoor kitchen area — 2 GFCI circuits + landscape lighting around pool. Trenched UF cable 18in deep. Low voltage path lights on transformer. Took longer than estimated due to root system.
Repeat customer (see JOB-003). Added 2 dedicated 20A circuits for home office. Fished wire through plaster walls — slow going. AFCI required per 2023 NEC.
Insurance required panel upgrade after adding pool equipment. GE panel still functional but undersized. Clean swap, no issues.
2 fan installs in bedrooms. Existing boxes were not fan-rated — replaced with brace-style boxes. Quick job, good attic access.

60A Zinsco to 200A — complete service upgrade including new mast, meter base, riser. CenterPoint had to come back twice for disconnect. Old mast was leaning 15 degrees. 3-day job with CenterPoint scheduling.
12 cans across kitchen, breakfast nook, and hallway. 3 zones with dimmers. Added 2 new circuits. Blown-in insulation was thick — used IC-rated cans.
Device upgrade throughout — replaced builder-grade toggle switches with Decora and added USB outlets in bedrooms and kitchen. All existing wiring in good shape.

Partial rewire — all K&T removed from attic and walls where accessible. New circuits for kitchen, bathrooms, bedrooms. Left some original wiring in walls where plaster was intact and tested safe. New service upgrade included. 5-day job. Permit + 2 inspections.
Zinsco swap — homeowner's insurance mandated replacement. Panel in utility closet, tight space. 2 double-tap issues corrected during swap.
New 30A dryer circuit — homeowner converting gas to electric dryer. 35ft run through crawl space. Straightforward.

jobs.address: 15823 Sweetwater River Dr, Sugar Land, TX 77478
jobs.notes: AFCI breakers tripping intermittently on 2 bedroom circuits. Found loose neutral in J-box behind master closet + backstabbed receptacles. Re-terminated all connections, replaced 3 devices, 2 breakers.
GFCI upgrades in kitchen + bathrooms, replaced old outlets and switches in those areas. All device-for-device swap, no new wiring needed.
16 recessed lights in game room + media room. 4 dimmer zones. New construction home had open attic — easy runs. 3 new circuits added.

materials.name: SQD QO 40A DP Breaker (main panel feed)

jobs.notes: Subpanel in master bedroom closet for new addition — bonus room above garage. 40A feed, short run. Will support 4 circuits for bonus room.
2 dedicated 20A circuits for kitchen renovation — one for dishwasher, one for countertop outlets. Dual-function breakers required per code. Old wiring left in place, new home runs from panel.
Montrose bungalow — FPE swap + whole house surge protector. Panel on exterior wall under carport. Good access. Homeowner also wants rewire quote — scheduled follow-up.
4 fan installs — all bedrooms. Existing light boxes replaced with fan-rated. Ran 14/3 to 2 rooms that didn't have separate switch legs. Good attic access in this Pearland subdivision.
Intermittent power loss in dining room. Traced to junction box in attic with corroded splice from old roof leak. Re-spliced and added new J-box with cover. Tested all circuits on that run.
Smart switch upgrade — occupancy sensors in bathrooms, laundry, pantry, garage. Vacancy sensors in closets. Standard Decora in remaining locations. All device-for-device, no wiring changes.
Heights bungalow — fuse box to 200A breaker panel. New mast, meter base, panel. CenterPoint coordination smooth this time. Old fuse box had 4 blown fuses jury-rigged with pennies.
Repeat customer (see JOB-011). Added 6 recessed lights in master bedroom and hallway. 2 zones. Easy job — already familiar with the attic layout from previous outdoor job.

jobs.address: 7203 Cherry Hills Dr, Sugar Land, TX 77479
jobs.notes: 60A circuit for hot tub on back patio. 40ft run through attic and down exterior wall in PVC conduit. Disconnect required within sight of unit.
Small Montrose cottage — FPE swap. Only 15 circuits. Panel in kitchen closet, tight but manageable. Inspector passed first try.
Whole-home device upgrade — USB outlets in all bedrooms and kitchen, dimmers in living areas. Builder-grade devices replaced throughout. 20 devices total.

materials.name: SQD HOM 60A DP Breaker (main panel feed)

jobs.notes: Subpanel for pool house/outdoor kitchen. 60A feed, 85ft run underground in conduit. Included circuits for pool pump, outdoor kitchen, lighting, and spare.

Kitchen circuit tripping repeatedly. Found failed GFCI downstream feeding 5 outlets. Replaced breaker and re-routed the downstream splice that was overheating. Homeowner was using space heater on kitchen circuit.
Repeat customer (see JOB-026). Living room and dining room recessed lighting. 6 cans on single dimmer + 1 new circuit. Plaster ceilings — careful cutting required.
EV charger circuit — 50A 240V to garage. Panel in garage, short run. Added disconnect per NEC 625. Newer home, clean panel with plenty of space.
Device refresh — all outlets and switches replaced in kitchen, bathrooms, utility. GFCIs added where missing. No wiring changes needed, all circuits grounded.
Zinsco swap. Had more circuits than expected — used 2 tandem breakers for low-draw lighting circuits. Panel in hallway closet. Drywall patch needed after — not our scope.

jobs.address: 1102 Conroe Park W Dr, Conroe, TX 77304

materials.name: Eaton CH 60A DP Breaker (main panel feed)

jobs.notes: Subpanel for barn/workshop on rural property. 100ft underground run in PVC. Hit a sprinkler line while trenching — homeowner repaired. Added welding outlet, compressor circuit, lights, and general outlets.
Montrose bungalow — 2 fans in living room and master. Old plaster ceilings with medallions. Installed pancake boxes on existing joists. 14/3 for independent switching. Tricky old-house fishing.

100A to 200A upgrade — adding central AC to this older Bellaire home. New mast, meter, panel. Added surge protector. AFCI breakers on bedroom circuits per current code. CenterPoint responsive, 2-day turnaround.

Full rewire — Heights cottage gutted to studs by homeowner. All K&T removed. New service, panel, every circuit. Walls open made it faster than usual but still 6 working days. 3 inspections total. Permit included.

jobs.address: 7203 Cherry Hills Dr, Sugar Land, TX 77479
jobs.notes: Repeat customer (see JOB-032). Landscape lighting for front and back yards — 8 spot lights on trees, 10 path lights along walkways. 1 new 20A GFCI circuit for patio outlets. Transformer on timer. Extensive trenching in clay soil.
100A to 200A service upgrade — homeowner adding central AC and EV charger. New meter base, weatherhead, riser, panel. Murray panel had scorched bus bar. CenterPoint coordination took an extra day.
Repeat customer (see JOB-007). Smart home upgrade — WiFi switches and dimmers throughout main living areas. All device-for-device, neutral wire present in all boxes. Helped homeowner set up app.

Half the house losing power intermittently. Found corroded main lug connection in panel and 2 open splices in attic from previous homeowner DIY work. Re-torqued lugs, boxed all open splices, replaced 1 damaged breaker. Took longer than estimated due to tracing multiple issues.

Living room, entry, and kitchen — 10 cans total. 3 dimmer zones + 1 three-way in hallway. Eyeball trims aimed at artwork in living room. 2 new circuits. Bellaire ranch with flat roof — easy attic crawl.
Whole-home device refresh before selling. Replaced all paint-clogged and yellowed receptacles and switches. GFCIs in kitchen and baths updated. 27 devices total. Realtor recommended us.

materials.name: SQD QO 50A DP Breaker (main panel feed)

jobs.notes: Subpanel in garage for EV charger + workshop circuits. New construction home, panel 15ft from subpanel location. Short run, clean install. Homeowner building out garage workshop.
Repeat customer (see JOB-029). EV charger circuit — 50A to garage. Panel in garage closet, 40ft run. Added disconnect per NEC 625.
Porch + yard lighting for Heights bungalow. 2 WP GFCI outlets on porch, low voltage landscape lights in front yard. 1 new 20A GFCI circuit. Trenching in tight Heights lot was challenging.
Repeat customer (see JOB-003, JOB-012). Single fan install in sunroom addition. Old box not fan-rated. Pancake box on joist. Quick job — already know this house well.

custom_materials.name: BUILDER LIGHT PACK - 12 LED FLUSH MOUNTS

jobs.notes: Major Bellaire rewire — FPE panel, aluminum branch wiring, and remnant K&T in attic. Full gut renovation. New service, every circuit, all devices. Dual-function breakers in kitchen and bath circuits. In progress — estimated 7 working days. Homeowner supplying chandelier and light fixtures.
